Id.description: Category unique identifier. If not informed, it will be automatically generated by VTEX.

Title.description: Text used in title tag for category page.

Description.description: Text used in meta description tag for category page.
Description.example: Discover our range of home appliances. Find smart vacuums, kitchen and laundry appliances to suit your needs. Order online now.

AdWordsRemarketingCode.description: This is a legacy field. Do not take this information into consideration.

LomadeeCampaignCode.description: This is a legacy field. Do not take this information into consideration.

FatherCategoryId.description: ID of the parent category, apply in case of category and subcategory.

ShowInStoreFront.description: If `true`, the category is shown in the top and side menu.

IsActive.description: If `true`, the category page becomes available in store.

ActiveStoreFrontLink.description: If `true`, the category link becomes active in store.

ShowBrandFilter.description: If `true`, the category page displays a brand filter.

StockKeepingUnitSelectionMode.description: Defines how the SKU will be exhibited

example.Name: Home Appliances
example.Title: Home Appliances
example.Description: Discover our range of home appliances. Find smart vacuums, kitchen and laundry appliances to suit your needs. Order online now.
